name: Runway Gen-4.5
description:
Runway Gen-4.5 is a premium VIDEO generation model producing cinematic, temporally consistent clips
with industry-leading motion quality and scene coherence. It supports text-to-video (prompt only)
and image-to-video (prompt + source image) in a single model. Best for AI-assisted filmmaking,
mood reels, and high-end social content requiring professional-grade video output.
bestPractices:
API field names (use exactly as shown):
  promptText (string, required): the cinematic scene description
  ratio (string, required): one of "1280:720"|"720:1280"|"1104:832"|"960:960"|"832:1104"|"1584:672"
  promptImage (string URL, optional): source image for image-to-video mode
  duration (integer, optional): 5 or 10 seconds

Prompt style: write promptText as a cinematographer's shot note — subject + camera move + lens +
lighting + mood + color grade ("slow push-in toward weathered cliff, anamorphic lens,
golden-hour side light, atmospheric haze, contemplative").

Image-to-video: when a source image is available, pass it as promptImage and describe only
motion and camera behavior in promptText. Use conservative motion intensity to avoid identity
drift on faces and complex textures.

Scope: keep each clip focused on a single motion beat. Generate 5-second segments for precision.

name: Runway Upscale
description:
Runway Upscale is an IMAGE enhancement model optimized for high-quality enlargement of visual
assets. It reduces artifacts and improves sharpness for draft or AI-generated images. Best for
preparing images for deliverables, print, or broadcast by increasing resolution and clarity.
bestPractices:
- Upscale after finalizing composition; upscaling early locks in unwanted artifacts.
- Avoid extreme sharpening on skin and smooth gradients; use moderate settings for natural results.
- For portrait-heavy imagery, consider face-aware enhancement modes if exposed by the endpoint.
